title: Bias Atlas — cognitive-bias catalogue grounded in Heuer and Kahneman
public_claim: A catalogued atlas of cognitive biases that affect analytical work.
distinctive_mechanism: Four coordinated lenses on the bias canon — biases catalogued by analytical lane, the scholarly foundation each bias is drawn from, and the mitigation grammar that maps bias to mitigating analytical move. Reading the atlas is a sequence: identify the bias, read its foundation, follow the mitigation map.
